calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT:
Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
